sourcesContent:
const doctorsData = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Dr. Malik Perera',
    img: 'https://example.com/doctor1.jpg',
    specialty: 'Neurologist',
    experience: '14 years',
    description:
      'Dr. Malik Perera is a dedicated neurologist with expertise in diagnosing and treating neurological disorders.',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Dr. Shanthi Fernando',
    img: 'https://example.com/doctor2.jpg',
    specialty: 'Oncologist',
    experience: '12 years',
    description:
      'Dr. Shanthi Fernando specializes in oncology and has extensive experience in treating various types of cancer.',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Dr. Nimal Silva',
    img: 'https://example.com/doctor3.jpg',
    specialty: 'Psychiatrist',
    experience: '16 years',
    description:
      'Dr. Nimal Silva is an experienced psychiatrist known for his compassionate care and expertise in mental health.',
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Dr. Anusha Bandara',
    img: 'https://example.com/doctor4.jpg',
    specialty: 'Endocrinologist',
    experience: '10 years',
    description:
      'Dr. Anusha Bandara specializes in endocrinology and has a decade of experience in managing hormonal disorders.',
  },
];

export default doctorsData;
